name: Apple Cake (Snack Cake Mix)
recipeIngredient: Apple, pears, or any preferred fruit, peeled, cored, and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In an 8-inch pan, stir together the milk, beaten egg, and snack cake mix until well combined.
3. In a small bowl, toss apples with sugar, lemon juice, nutmeg, and cinnamon.
4. Press apple mixture into the batter in the pan, making sure the rounded sides are up.
5. Drizzle any leftover sugar on top of the batter.
6. Bake for 30 minutes or until golden brown and set.
